# Awesome GitHub README
> The definitive curated collection of GitHub profile README tools, generators, templates, and inspiration. Stats, cards, animations, widgets, and more. Part of the coolreadme.xyz ecosystem.

## What This Is

A curated collection of 50+ free tools for creating stunning GitHub profile READMEs. Everything from stats cards to animations to music widgets. Updated weekly.

## Categories

- Profile Card Generators — Dynamic profile cards (coolreadme.xyz, github-profile-summary, etc.)
- Stats & Metrics — Contribution stats, streaks, top languages
- Animations & Effects — Typing SVG, contribution snakes, animated headers
- Tech Stack & Skills — Technology display widgets
- Social & Activity — Blog post feeds, activity feeds
- Music, Media & Lifestyle — Spotify-style, gaming, streaming cards
- Achievements & Trophies — Trophy showcases, visitor badges
- Badges & Icons — Shields.io, simple-icons, badgen
- Templates & Inspiration — Ready-to-use README layouts

## Featured Tools

| Tool | Category | Stars |
|------|----------|-------|
| github-readme-stats | Stats | 70k+ |
| readme-typing-svg | Animation | 6k+ |
| github-profile-trophy | Achievements | 5k+ |
| spotify-github-profile | Music | 1k+ |
| coolreadme.xyz | Cards | 23+ card types |

## coolreadme.xyz — 23+ Card Types

coolreadme.xyz is a free, open-source card generator. No signup. Embed any card as a markdown image URL.

### Entertainment
- **Netflix card** (`/api/netflix-card`) — Now watching card. Styles: `classic`, `slim`, `compact`. Params: title, synopsis, cast, genre, rating, match, season, episode, quality, progress, img, style
- **YouTube card** (`/api/youtube-card`) — Video card. Styles: `default`, `shorts`, `slim`. Params: title, channel, subscribers, views, likes, duration, img, verified, style
- **YouTube channel** (`/api/youtube-channel`) — Channel stats card
- **Twitch card** (`/api/twitch-card`) — Stream/clip status. Styles: `stream`, `compact`, `clip`. Params: streamer, game, title, viewers, uptime, tags, img, verified, partner, style

### Music & Lifestyle
- **Now Listening** (`/api/now-listening`) — Spotify-style music widget. Styles: `spotify`, `dark`. Params: song, artist, style
- **Cat card** (`/api/cat-card`) — GitHub streak tracker with cat evolution. Stages: SEED (0d), SPROUT (4d), GRIND (10d), STREAK (20d), GOD (30d+). Params: user, streak, longest, total
- **Dog card** (`/api/dog-card`) — GitHub streak tracker with dog breed evolution. Breeds: Smol Pug (0d), Corgi (4d), Golden Retriever (10d), Winter Wolf/Husky (20d), Alpha Doge (30d+). Params: user, streak, longest, total

### Gaming
- **Steam card** (`/api/steam-card`) — Gaming library card. Styles: `default`, `compact`, `slim`. Params: game, genre, hours, achievements, lastPlayed, reviews, img, style
- **Gaming card** (`/api/gaming`) — Generic gaming status. Params: game, platform, rank, hours, genre, style, img

### Social Media
- **X/Twitter card** (`/api/x-card`) — Tweet card. Styles: `default`, `compact`, `thread`. Themes: `dark`, `dim`, `light`. Params: user, handle, content, verified, likes, retweets, views, style, theme
- **Instagram card** (`/api/instagram-card`) — Instagram post style. Params: title, sub, user, img, skills (shown as hashtags)
- **TikTok card** (`/api/tiktok-card`) — TikTok video style with engagement. Params: title, sub, user, img, skills (shown as hashtags)

### Profile & Identity
- **Avatar card** (`/api/avatar-card`) — GitHub avatar on gradient. Params: user, status, focus, theme
- **Hacker card** (`/api/hacker`) — Terminal aesthetic. Params: user, status, accent
- **Cinematic card** (`/api/cinematic`) — Dark atmospheric. Params: user, status, focus, accent
- **AI Identity card** (`/api/ai-card`) — AI tool badge. Tools: `claude`, `cursor`, `gemini`, `codex`, `grok`, `perplexity`. Params: tool, role, tagline

### Project & Content
- **Project card** (`/api/project-card`) — Project showcase. Params: name, desc, lang, stars, theme, img
- **Tech DNA** (`/api/tech-dna`) — Tech stack visualization. Params: stack (comma-separated), label, theme
- **Article card** (`/api/article-card`) — Blog post card. Params: title, excerpt, tag, author, theme, img
- **Docs card** (`/api/docs-card`) — npm/package docs. Params: pkg, version, desc, install, theme
- **Social card** (`/api/social-card`) — Multi-platform profile. Params: title, sub, user, style, img, skills

### Fun
- **Claude Code card** (`/api/claude-code-card-svg`) — Claude Code branded badge

## How to Use

All cards are plain GET requests returning `image/svg+xml` or `image/png`. No auth, no body, no side effects.

```markdown
![Now Watching](https://coolreadme.xyz/api/netflix-card?title=Severance&season=2&episode=Episode+9&genre=Sci-Fi&match=98&quality=4K&style=classic)

![Now Listening](https://coolreadme.xyz/api/now-listening?song=Not+Like+Us&artist=Kendrick+Lamar&style=spotify)

![AI Badge](https://coolreadme.xyz/api/ai-card?tool=claude&role=user&tagline=building+with+agents)

![Streak](https://coolreadme.xyz/api/dog-card?user=YOURNAME&streak=22)
```

Customize params in the URL, paste as `![label](url)` in any markdown file.

## Quick Links

- Browse & generate: https://coolreadme.xyz/generator
- All templates: https://coolreadme.xyz/templates
- API reference: https://coolreadme.xyz/llms.txt
- This collection: https://github.com/yerdaulet-damir/awesome-github-readme
- Contribute: See CONTRIBUTING.md
